prompt: What is the ratio of active to inactive enrollments?

inputData.question: What is the ratio of active to inactive enrollments?

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"What is the ratio of active to inactive enrollments?"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"What is the ratio of active to inactive enrollments?"},"startedAt":1771855649841,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"The enrollments table has an is_active boolean column that distinguishes active from inactive enrollments. To calculate the ratio of active to inactive enrollments, I'll count enrollments grouped by is_active status and compute the ratio. The query will count active enrollments (is_active = true) and inactive enrollments (is_active = false), then calculate the ratio as active_count / inactive_count.","sql":"
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_active = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS active_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_active = false THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS inactive_count,
  ROUND(
    SUM(CASE WHEN is_active = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::numeric / 
    NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN is_active = false THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0),
    2
  ) AS active_to_inactive_ratio
FROM public.enrollments
","assumptions":["The is_active column in the enrollments table indicates whether an enrollment is active (true) or inactive (false)","The ratio is calculated as active_count / inactive_count, rounded to 2 decimal places","If there are no inactive enrollments, the ratio will be NULL to avoid division by zero"]},"endedAt":1771855664118},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_active = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS active_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_active = false THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS inactive_count,
  ROUND(
    SUM(CASE WHEN is_active = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::numeric / 
    NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN is_active = false THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0),
    2
  ) AS active_to_inactive_ratio
FROM public.enrollments

result.sql:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_active = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS active_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_active = false THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS inactive_count,
  ROUND(
    SUM(CASE WHEN is_active = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::numeric / 
    NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN is_active = false THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0),
    2
  ) AS active_to_inactive_ratio
FROM public.enrollments
